title: lasianthus neolanceolatus
intro: Lasianthus neolanceolatus, also known as the Lanceolate Lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is a shrub that is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in China, and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus neolanceolatus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections, and it can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for herbal use.
